features.name: Multi-module Gradle project
features.description: Kotlin DSL multi-module project with version catalog (:app, :core, :network, :androidauto, :streaming, :web)

features.name: App state machine
features.description: Sealed class state machine with StateFlow (Idle -> HotspotReady -> VpnReady -> ServerRunning -> Streaming)

features.name: VPN tunnel service
features.description: VpnService assigning virtual IP 240.3.3.3 via TUN interface to bypass Tesla private IP blocking

features.name: Hotspot manager
features.description: Detect hotspot state, monitor connected clients via ARP table polling, emit reactive Flow

features.name: Ktor embedded web server
features.description: HTTP server on 240.3.3.3:8080 serving web frontend, health endpoint, WebSocket stub

features.name: Main foreground service
features.description: Foreground service orchestrating VPN + hotspot + server lifecycle with notification

features.name: Phone dashboard UI
features.description: Jetpack Compose UI with start/stop button, status indicators, URL display

features.name: Protobuf message definitions
features.description: AAP protobuf schemas: version, service discovery, channel open, video/audio config, input events

features.name: AAP message framing
features.description: Read/write AAP frames (channel + flags + length + payload), multi-frame reassembly

features.name: TLS handshake layer
features.description: SSLEngine-based TLS 1.2 within AAP framing, trust-all for local AA server

features.name: Channel multiplexer
features.description: Demux incoming frames to handlers, mux outgoing with thread-safe Mutex, support video/audio/input/sensor channels

features.name: AA head unit emulator
features.description: Connect to localhost:5277, version exchange, TLS, service discovery, channel negotiation, receive H.264 video

features.name: Video channel handler
features.description: Receive H.264 NAL units from AA video channel, emit to SharedFlow

features.name: Audio channel handler
features.description: Receive PCM audio data from AA audio channels, emit to SharedFlow

features.name: Local video validation
features.description: Decode H.264 via MediaCodec and display AA UI on phone SurfaceView for debugging

features.name: Keepalive (PING/PONG)
features.description: AAP ping request/response to maintain connection

features.name: H.264 NAL unit parser
features.description: Parse Annex B byte stream into typed NAL units (SPS/PPS/IDR/P-frame), streaming mode support

features.name: Fragmented MP4 muxer
features.description: Minimal ISO BMFF writer: ftyp + moov (avc1/avcC) init segment, moof+mdat media segments, Annex B to AVCC conversion

features.name: MSE WebSocket streaming
features.description: Stream fMP4 init + media segments as WebSocket binary frames to Tesla browser

features.name: MJPEG fallback stream
features.description: Decode H.264 to Bitmap, encode JPEG, serve as multipart HTTP stream at /stream.mjpeg

features.name: Web frontend video player
features.description: JavaScript MSE player with capability detection, buffer management, live edge tracking, MJPEG fallback

features.name: Tesla-optimized web layout
features.description: Fullscreen black layout, no scroll/zoom, status indicator, touch overlay div

features.name: Browser touch capture
features.description: Pointer Events on overlay div, coordinate normalization (0-1), multi-touch, gesture prevention, move throttling

features.name: Touch event relay server
features.description: WebSocket JSON deserialization, coordinate transform (normalized -> AA pixels), AAP InputEvent protobuf generation

features.name: Unified bidirectional WebSocket
features.description: Single /ws endpoint: server sends binary video, client sends text touch events

features.name: AAP input channel integration
features.description: Forward touch events from relay to AA via encrypted input channel

features.name: Advanced touch gestures
features.description: Long press, drag/swipe, two-finger pinch-to-zoom, scroll wheel support

features.name: Audio channel data handler
features.description: Parse AAP audio frames (header + PCM), support media/navigation/call streams, emit via SharedFlow

features.name: AAC encoder
features.description: Hardware MediaCodec AAC-LC encoder: 44100Hz stereo 128kbps, async callback pipeline

features.name: Audio-video fMP4 muxing
features.description: Add mp4a/esds audio track to init segment, interleave audio+video in media segments

features.name: Browser audio playback
features.description: Unmute on first touch, volume control overlay, handle autoplay policy

features.name: Audio focus management
features.description: Handle AAP audio focus requests, stream priority (call > nav > media), volume ducking

features.name: Bluetooth audio fallback
features.description: Route audio via A2DP when browser audio unavailable (MJPEG mode)

features.name: WebRTC SDK integration
features.description: Google WebRTC Android SDK, PeerConnectionFactory with H.264 hardware encoder support

features.name: H.264 passthrough video source
features.description: Custom VideoEncoder feeding pre-encoded AA H.264 NAL units into WebRTC, fallback decode+re-encode

features.name: WebRTC audio source
features.description: Custom AudioDeviceModule feeding AA PCM into WebRTC Opus encoder, disable audio processing

features.name: WebRTC signaling server
features.description: HTTP endpoints for SDP offer/answer exchange and ICE candidate exchange

features.name: WebRTC data channel for touch
features.description: Replace WebSocket touch events with SCTP DataChannel for lower latency

features.name: Browser WebRTC client
features.description: RTCPeerConnection setup, SDP exchange, track handling, fallback chain (WebRTC -> MSE -> MJPEG)

features.name: Setup wizard
features.description: 6-step guided setup: AA config, hotspot, VPN permission, Tesla connection, QR code URL display

features.name: Auto-reconnection
features.description: Exponential backoff retry for all connections: WebSocket, AA emulator, VPN; handle browser refresh, WiFi blips

features.name: Adaptive bitrate
features.description: Dynamic quality adjustment based on RTT, dropped frames, buffer level; 5 quality levels

features.name: Battery optimization
features.description: Wake lock, WiFi lock, battery monitoring, quality reduction on battery, USB charge detection

features.name: Error handling & messaging
features.description: User-friendly error messages with recovery actions for all failure scenarios

features.name: Settings screen
features.description: Video (resolution, FPS, mode), audio, network (IP, port), advanced (logs, debug) settings with DataStore

features.name: Web diagnostics panel
features.description: Browser-accessible /debug page: connection status, video/audio stats, touch log, memory, battery

features.name: Multi-Android version compatibility
features.description: Test and fix for Android 8.0 through 15, handle version-specific APIs and permissions

features.name: Tesla firmware compatibility
features.description: Test MCU2 (Intel) and MCU3 (AMD), verify codec support, tune defaults per hardware
